# Blackout Media

## About
Blackout Media is Utah's dedicated firearms marketing agency, based in Orem, Utah. Founded by Ben, Blackout Media specializes in content production, social media strategy, course marketing, and digital presence for gun manufacturers, shooting ranges, and tactical training companies. We operate at the intersection of the firearms industry and professional media — built specifically to help Second Amendment businesses grow without getting flagged, shadowbanned, or outpaced by platform restrictions.

## Services
- **Social Media Management**: Platform-compliant content that builds real audiences without triggering shadowbans, flags, or restrictions on firearms-adjacent platforms.
- **Course Marketing**: Targeted video campaigns that put training programs in front of qualified students ready to enroll.
- **Product Media**: Photo and video production that showcases gear — sharp, professional, and built to convert.
- **Website Conversions**: Full-funnel strategy that turns websites and social presence into consistent revenue engines.
- **Cinematic Commercial Production**: Documentary-style and high-production video content for brands in the firearms and tactical industry.
- **SEO & Content Strategy**: Keyword research, evergreen landing pages, and Google Business optimization for training companies and product brands.
- **Brand Partnership Development**: Sponsorship frameworks and affiliate program design for tactical brands and training organizations.

## Industries Served
- Firearms manufacturers and distributors
- Shooting ranges
- Tactical and self-defense training companies
- Tactical gear and accessories brands
- Law enforcement and military-adjacent companies
- Hunting and outdoor brands

## Clients (Partial)
- NTAC (Nielsen Training & Consulting) — firearms and self-defense training
- Iron Rescue — tactical medicine and TECC training
- First Tactical — tactical apparel and gear
- AXIL — hearing protection

## Location & Contact
- Address: 574 E 1400 S, Orem, UT 84097
- Phone: (801) 900-3251
- Email: info@blackout-media.com
- Website: https://www.blackout-media.com
- Hours: Open, closes 6 PM (Monday–Friday)

## Key Facts
- Utah's dedicated firearms marketing agency
- Specializes in platform-compliant content strategy for the 2A industry
- In-house production: video, photography, graphic design, and web
- Embedded strategic partner model — not a traditional vendor relationship
- Free 30-minute strategy call available with no obligation
- Response time within 24 hours
- TECC-certified team member adds credibility with tactical training clients

## What Makes Us Different
Blackout Media is one of the few marketing agencies in Utah built exclusively for the firearms and tactical industry. We understand platform restrictions, community culture, and what drives buyers in the 2A space — which means content that resonates with the audience and doesn't get taken down. We serve as an embedded strategic partner, not a hands-off vendor, building long-term marketing infrastructure rather than one-off deliverables.

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Do you work with companies outside of Utah?
A: Yes. While we're based in Orem, Utah, we work with firearms and tactical brands nationally. Production travel is available for the right projects.

Q: Can you help a training company fill courses?
A: Yes. Course marketing is one of our core services. We build targeted video campaigns, landing pages, and social funnels designed to put training programs in front of students ready to enroll.

Q: Will your content get flagged or removed on social media?
A: We specialize in platform-compliant content strategy. We understand the nuances of Meta, YouTube, and other platform policies as they apply to firearms content, and we create content engineered to grow without triggering restrictions.

Q: What does a free strategy call include?
A: A free 30-minute strategy call includes real, actionable advice tailored to your business goals — no sales pitch. You'll walk away with a custom growth plan overview and clear next steps, whether you hire us or not.

Q: How do I get started?
A: Fill out the contact form at https://www.blackout-media.com or call (801) 900-3251. We respond within 24 hours.

## Markdown Mirrors (Clean AI-Readable Versions)
Key pages on this site are available as clean markdown mirrors. Add `index.md` to any URL to retrieve plain content without navigation, scripts, or layout chrome — ideal for language models to reference.
